phrases.cultural_note: Directs to the traditional Alentejan counter for local wines and spirits.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de bebidas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH beh-BEE-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the drinks counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the drinks counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH beh-BEE-duhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no balcão de bebidas.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso selecionar garrafas de vinho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo seh-lih-seeoo-NAHR guh-RAH-fuhsh DIH VEE-nyoo?

phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde devo deixar a gorjeta aqui?
phrases.cultural_note: Guides to the checkout tip jar, common in traditional Portuguese eateries.

likely_response.local: Pode deixar na caixinha ao lado do caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih day-SHAHR NUH keye-SHEE-nyuh OW LAH-doo DOO KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can leave it in the little box next to the cashier.

responses.english: You can leave it in the little box next to the cashier.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih day-SHAHR NUH keye-SHEE-nyuh OW LAH-doo DOO KEYE-shuh.
responses.local: Pode deixar na caixinha ao lado do caixa.

phrases.text_local: Pode me indicar um café bom perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OONNG kuh-FEH BOHNG PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Chefe de Sala, ele conhece bem a zona.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh, EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the Head Waiter, he knows the area well.

responses.english: Ask the Head Waiter, he knows the area well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh, EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao Chefe de Sala, ele conhece bem a zona.

phrases.cultural_note: Em Portugal, o balcão de bebidas é muitas vezes o mesmo que o balcão principal ou da caixa.
Gorjetas em Portugal são geralmente deixadas num pote no balcão, não na mesa.

likely_response.local: Pode deixar no pote de gorjetas.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih day-SHAHR NOO PAW-tih DIH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can leave it in the tip jar.

responses.english: You can leave it in the tip jar.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih day-SHAHR NOO PAW-tih DIH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuhsh.
responses.local: Pode deixar no pote de gorjetas.

phrases.text_local: Onde é que se paga a conta?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee EE-kee SEE PAH-gah ah KOHN-tah
phrases.cultural_note: Points to the entrance area for standard payment processing.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pode pagar na caixa, que fica perto da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh, KIH FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, you can pay at the cash register, which is near the entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, you can pay at the cash register, which is near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh, KIH FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, pode pagar na caixa, que fica perto da entrada.

phrases.cultural_note: Directs to the receipt printer located behind the service counter.

likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the counter.

responses.english: You can ask at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where wine bottles are sold
phrases.text_local: Onde vendem as garrafas de vinho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih VAYNG-dayng UHSH guh-RAH-fuhsh DIH VEE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: References the local wine selection area typical of Évora taverns.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão da garrafeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH guh-ruh-FAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the wine cellar counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the wine cellar counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH guh-ruh-FAY-ruh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no balcão da garrafeira.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso selecionar uma garrafa de vinho aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo seh-lih-seeoo-NAHR OO-muh guh-RAH-fuh DIH VEE-nyoo uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Garrafista ou ao Chefe de Sala.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-FEESH-tuh OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the Wine Steward or the Head Waiter.

responses.english: Ask the Wine Steward or the Head Waiter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-FEESH-tuh OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao Garrafista ou ao Chefe de Sala.
